name: bebop
title: Bebop — your own coding agent
description: Standalone AGPL-3.0 coding-agent CLI that drives any connected agentic CLI (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes, Aider, Goose, or a free LLM) behind one Rust/WASM guard kernel. Free LLM by default; one control surface for every agent; a fail-closed, testable guard; docs where every statement is backed by a live probe or a deterministic test.

verification.rule: Constant Doubt — no verification, no statement

commands.name: boot
commands.summary: Guard self-test; refuses to start if gates can't go RED.

commands.name: init
commands.summary: 5-axis personalization wizard → ~/.bebop/settings.json.

commands.name: status
commands.summary: Agent rotation + connection status (free first by default).

commands.name: agents
commands.summary: List every agentic CLI Bebop can drive, with live status.

commands.name: use
commands.summary: Switch default agent; persists; refuses unconnected unless --force.

commands.name: run
commands.summary: Full agentic loop; routes task class to cheapest adequate lane.

commands.name: dispatch
commands.summary: One-shot task through guard + copilot; red-line denied before any agent runs.

commands.name: route
commands.summary: Show token-router decision for a task class.

commands.name: recall
commands.summary: Query in-process living memory only (VSA retriever NOT bundled; honest).

commands.name: remember
commands.summary: Write a concept into the living memory.

commands.name: memory
commands.summary: Inspect the living memory.

commands.name: store
commands.summary: Inspect the content-addressed store.

commands.name: govern
commands.summary: L5 telemetry governor (PID + ICIR + resonance) over a quality stream.

commands.name: self
commands.summary: Self-maintenance / self-evolution (fail-closed, reversible).

commands.name: node
commands.summary: Encrypted-at-rest node identity (PQ + Ed25519).

commands.name: sync
commands.summary: Optional self-hosted Better Auth sync server.

commands.name: map
commands.summary: Render the real import graph as an SVG image.

commands.name: diagrams
commands.summary: Regenerate every SVG visual (project map + conceptual schemas).

commands.name: mcp
commands.summary: Model Context Protocol server over stdio (zero new deps).

commands.name: help
commands.summary: Command list.

security_model.hooks: shell-less; commands with metacharacters are refused

limitations: NOT a model provider (drives models, does not train/host them)
NOT a sandbox / OS-level container (policy gate only; run agents with least privilege)
NOT a bundled VSA retriever (recall is in-process living memory only; states this honestly)
NOT a replacement for human review of money/auth/RLS changes
NOT multi-user / NOT a hosted service (one user, one local process)
NOT a build system, package manager, or CI runner

localization.convention: README.<lang>.md in repo root (GitHub shows a language switcher)
localization.notes: Browser-native translate (Firefox Translations is fully local/OSS) works on rendered pages. Machine drafts are stamped MACHINE TRANSLATED DRAFT and are NOT authoritative; English is source of truth.
